title_zh: 波士顿儿童医院利用人工智能实现新诊断
title_en: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
summary_zh: 波士顿儿童医院采用OpenAI技术改善患者护理，减轻运营负担，并帮助诊断40多例罕见疾病。
summary_en: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.
why_it_matters_zh: 利用人工智能技术，医院能够更有效地分析复杂病例，发现罕见疾病，提高诊断准确性和效率。
why_it_matters_en: By leveraging AI technology, the hospital can more effectively analyze complex cases, identify rare diseases, and improve diagnostic accuracy and efficiency.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 通过Rosalind生物防御强化社会韧性
title_en: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
summary_zh: OpenAI推出Rosalind生物防御，向经过审核的开发者和美国政府合作伙伴开放GPT-Rosalind，推动生物防御、公共健康及大流行病准备的前沿AI应用。
summary_en: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过提供专门面向生物防御领域的先进AI工具，OpenAI助力提升社会抵御健康威胁的能力，促进公共安全与健康保障。
why_it_matters_en: By providing advanced AI tools specialized for biodefense, OpenAI helps enhance society's ability to combat health threats and supports public safety and health security.

title_zh: PyTorch性能分析（第一部分）：torch.profiler初学者指南
title_en: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 1): A Beginner's Guide to torch.profiler
summary_zh: 本文介绍了PyTorch中性能分析的基础知识，重点讲解如何使用torch.profiler工具来监测和优化模型性能。
summary_en: This article introduces the basics of profiling in PyTorch, focusing on how to use the torch.profiler tool to monitor and optimize model performance.
why_it_matters_zh: 性能分析是优化深度学习模型运行效率的重要步骤，torch.profiler作为PyTorch官方工具，提供了详细且直观的性能数据，非常适合初学者学习使用。
why_it_matters_en: Performance profiling is a crucial step in optimizing deep learning models. torch.profiler, as an official PyTorch tool, provides detailed and intuitive performance data, making it ideal for beginners to learn and use.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 1): A Beginner's Guide to torch.profiler. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: ITBench-AA：首个面向智能企业IT任务的基准测试中，前沿模型得分低于50%——来自Artificial Analysis和IBM
title_en: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
summary_zh: Artificial Analysis和IBM发布了ITBench-AA，这是首个专注于智能企业IT任务的基准测试。测试结果显示，当前前沿模型在这些任务上的表现均未超过50%，表明现有模型在企业IT自动化方面仍有较大提升空间。
summary_en: Artificial Analysis and IBM introduced ITBench-AA, the first benchmark dedicated to agentic enterprise IT tasks. Results show that current frontier models score below 50% on these tasks, indicating significant room for improvement in enterprise IT automation capabilities of existing models.
why_it_matters_zh: 该基准测试首次集中评估了智能企业IT相关的代理任务，揭示了先进模型在实际应用中的不足，推动企业IT自动化技术的发展。
why_it_matters_en: This benchmark provides the first focused evaluation of agentic tasks in enterprise IT, exposing shortcomings of advanced models in real-world applications and promoting progress in enterprise IT automation technologies.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

why_it_matters_en: Fully local processing enhances privacy and responsiveness, allowing users more flexible control over the robot.
